features: Sure Cotton Dry Anti-perspirant Deodorant Aerosol 200 ml provides 48-hour dry protection against sweat and odour
This women's deodorant spray features Sure's unique MotionSense technology to give you an all-day fresh fragrance that activates as you move
To keep sweat and odour at bay, shake well, then spray in short bursts in a well-ventilated area, holding the can 15 cm away from your underarm
Get all-day freshness and protection from sweat and odour with this alcohol-free*, dermatologically tested anti-perspirant deodorant for women
Thanks to Sure’s compressed technology, this 200 ml anti-perspirant will last just as long as our previous 250 ml can, but with less packaging
With Sure Cotton Dry Anti-Perspirant Deodorant Aerosol, you're always protected and can feel confident whatever happens. Sure, it won’t let you down
description: Product Description Sure Cotton Dry Anti-Perspirant Deodorant Aerosol features a dermatologically tested, alcohol-free* formula that provides 48-hour protection against sweat and odour so you can feel fresh, dry and protected all day without worrying about irritation. This anti-perspirant deodorant for women uses Sure’s innovative MotionSense technology to release bursts of light, clean fragrance inspired by fresh cotton sheets when you need it most. It works like this: unique microcapsules sit on the surface of your skin. When you move, friction breaks those microcapsules releasing more fragrance. So, the more you move, the more it protects. That fresh scent stays with you no matter how hard you push yourself. Because when you work hard, Sure works harder. Sure. It won’t let you down. Have the confidence to move beyond your limits with Sure Cotton Dry anti-perspirant deodorant spray. To get all-day freshness and 48-hour protection that works in sync with your body, shake well, then spray in short bursts in a well-ventilated area, holding the can 15 cm away from your underarm. This anti-perspirant deodorant is assembled in a factory using 100% renewable grid electricity. Made with infinitely recyclable aluminium, the compressed 200 ml can is smaller but lasts just as long as its 250 ml equivalent. Please recycle. Let’s move together for a sustainable future. *ethyl alcohol Ingredients Butane, Isobutane, Propane, Aluminum Chlorohydrate, PPG-14 Butyl Ether, Cyclopentasiloxane, Parfum, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Octyldodecanol, BHT, Dimethiconol, Propylene Carbonate, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Sodium Starch Octenylsuccinate, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Benzyl Alcohol, Benzyl Salicylate, Citronellol, Geraniol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool. Directions Shake the anti-perspirant can, then hold it 15 cm away from your underarm and spray evenly in a well-ventilated area. Manufacturer Contact Information Unilever Dept ER, Wirral CH63 3JW UK See more
